item.name: Heliodor Carbuncle
item.description:
If ever unfaithful, return for a full refund.

Use item to acquire the Heliodor Carbuncle minion.
item.tooltip:
I hope to...create a new
variety of Carbuncle, perhaps.
   - Alphinaud
